mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REVIEW( MEMBER_ID, REVIEW_PLATFORM, REVIEW_RELATED, REVIEW_TITLE, REVIEW_CONTENT, REVIEW_IMG, REVIEW_RATING ) VALUES( #{memberId}, #{reviewPlatform}, #{reviewRelated}, #{reviewTitle}, #{reviewContent}, #{reviewImg}, #{reviewRating} )
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(gc.genre_category_name SEPARATOR ', ') FROM review_mapping rm JOIN genre_category gc ON gc.genre_category_id = rm.genre_category_id WHERE rm.review_id = r.review_id) AS genreCategoryName FROM review r WHERE r.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.review_created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT r.*, m.member_name AS memberName, m.member_profile_img AS memberProfileImg, m.member_grade AS memberGrade FROM review r JOIN member m ON m.member_id = r.member_id WHERE r.review_id = #{reviewId}
SELECT gc.genre_category_id, gc.genre_category_name FROM review_mapping rm JOIN genre_category gc ON gc.genre_category_id = rm.genre_category_id WHERE rm.review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET review_platform = #{reviewPlatform}, review_related = #{reviewRelated}, review_title = #{reviewTitle}, review_content = #{reviewContent}, review_img = #{reviewImg}, review_rating = #{reviewRating}, review_updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
